steps.t: Speak with Mizâdi in Zajâna. Mizâdi said she intends to speak with the Doorwards, who can be found near the Shorakhúna, the great council hall in Zajâ…
Find Khâbakh within the Kalmakhíla to ask him for knowledge about the blight afflicting Adagím. The Kalmakhíla can be found on the western slope near …
Return to Mizâdi outside the Shorakhúna in Zajâna.
